title: Write a Kubernetes Manifest
description: Produce a sound Kubernetes deployment for a service.
content:
Write Kubernetes manifests for a {{stack}} service that: {{requirements}}

Include: a Deployment with resource requests and limits, liveness and readiness probes, a Service, and config via ConfigMap or Secret (no secrets inline). Run as non-root. Set a sensible replica count and a rolling-update strategy. Explain the probe and resource choices, and what would make this production-ready versus a starting point.
